role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on Hangul script and language identification.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and settlement density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific tree species (Pinus densiflora) and forest biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed script on vehicles and infrastructure styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like utility pole design and truck models.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified South Korea. The linguistic evidence (Hangul) was the primary discriminator, correctly applied by the tournament to eliminate all non-Korean candidates. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Hangul text clearly visible on trucks.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Steep terrain and concrete buildings match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Pine and deciduous trees visible in background.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Truck styles and pole configurations match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Truck models and pole styles accurately described.
